profile: Backend software engineer with 5+ years building and modernizing web products and data-driven platforms. Specialized in Python and Django REST Framework, designing REST APIs and microservices backed by PostgreSQL and ClickHouse, and deploying on AWS with Docker and CI/CD. Experienced in data/ML integrations (Amazon SageMaker), system integrations, performance optimization and software quality, leading delivery from requirements to production.

skills.Languages: Python, Java, JavaScript, Dart, C, C++, R, Prolog, LaTeX
skills.Backend: Django, Django REST Framework, Flask, Spring Boot, REST APIs, microservices, RBAC, XML
skills.Data: PostgreSQL, ClickHouse, MySQL, MongoDB, SQLite, ETL
skills.Cloud & AWS: AWS (Lambda, EC2, S3, SQS, SageMaker, Fargate, API Gateway, CloudWatch), Google Cloud, Firestore, Serverless
skills.DevOps: Docker, Docker Compose, Nginx, reverse proxy, container orchestration, GitHub Actions, CI/CD
skills.Frontend: Vue.js, React, Hotwire Turbo, Stimulus, HTML, CSS, jQuery

projects.name: Voltia
projects.description: Platform for a solar energy company
details: Lead a team of 2 developers and drive the platform's construction from its initial phase, defining architecture and technical standards.
Lead requirements discovery and field testing with operations teams, translating real operational workflows into the product.
Built the corporate website and am building the internal platform that centralizes the company's operations management.
Designed role-based access control (RBAC) with differentiated permissions and actions for multiple client profiles.
Integrated external systems to keep inventory synchronized in real time and updated automatically.
Containerized the applications with Docker and configured Nginx as a reverse proxy, orchestrating multiple services on a shared server.
projects.stack: Vue.js, Django REST Framework, PostgreSQL, Docker and Nginx.

projects.name: Lebana
details: Maintain and evolve the platform by delivering new business requirements into production.
Redesigned the customer-facing application, raising performance, usability and visual experience to modern standards.
Led the migration from a monolithic architecture to microservices, improving the system's scalability and flexibility.

projects.name: Corporate websites
details: Built and deployed three corporate websites: CosmasTitle (cosmastitle.com), Sendigo Finance (sendigofinance.com) and Atlantic Basin Energy (atlanticbasinenergy.com).
Packaged the environments with Docker and configured Nginx to route multiple domains and services on shared servers.
Designed and implemented a PDF generator for issuing tax documents in freight logistics.
Built an XML document validation architecture aligned with national tax specifications, ensuring regulatory compliance.
Implemented CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions, automating releases and reducing manual deployments.
Built a cost-estimation model with Amazon SageMaker that reached 92% accuracy.
Integrated the Google Maps APIs (Geocoding, Routes and Places) for geolocation and freight route planning.
Built a real-time chat with Firestore and automated on-demand report generation with AWS Fargate.

projects.name: CarbonQuota
details: Integrated the SendGrid API to automate email marketing campaigns.
Optimized site performance, cutting load time by 20%.
Implemented table pagination, speeding up data loading by 73%.
Developed generation of signed PDF documents from HTML content.
Delivered 10+ features for carbon emissions tracking and management.

projects.name: Aria
details: Evolved the product with the engineering team from a large single-script monolithic solution.
Migrated the solution to a web application, improving the user experience and automating the operational process.

projects.name: Shared email library
details: Analyzed multiple client repositories and extracted email-sending logic into a reusable shared library.
Standardized email integration across projects, removing duplicated code and improving maintainability.
Developed a template inheritance and extension mechanism to cover that missing capability in Resend.
Developed teaching materials and taught Calculus I, Calculus III and Numerical Methods in the Computer Science, Telecommunications and Mechanical Engineering faculties.
Served on internship evaluation panels and as a reviewer for undergraduate theses.
Designed, developed and deployed a system to manage the PCR sample flow for the molecular genetics laboratory.
Reduced processing times and data-entry errors; tripled report creation speed compared with the manual process.

experience.company: Union of Computer Scientists of Cuba
details: Designed and built Cola.cu, a queue-control system for COVID-19 prevention that processed more than 1.5 million people in Havana.
Developed a consolidation module that unified the daily queues generated by the application at national scale.

certifications.name: Official ClickHouse Certification
certifications.description: data modeling, querying and analysis. Credential on Credly.

awards.name: CITMA First Prize & Provincial Innovation Award, 2021
awards.description: Gemalab, PCR sample-flow management system. Cuba

awards.name: Sustainable Development Award, Global Game Jam, 2020
Second Prize, National Computing Contest, 2019
awards.description: Instance generator for team formation. Cuba
